runs.note: Migrated from OAuth implicit flow to authorization code flow with PKCE. Changed response_type to 'code', implemented PKCE with S256 challenge method, added state parameter for CSRF protection, implemented code-to-token exchange in handleCallback, and changed token storage to use memory instead of localStorage for security. All existing function exports maintained.
